positiveClaims: DOCX review preflight is exposed as a separate review-bridge command surface: cmd.project.review.inspectDocxReviewPreflight.
The command accepts pathless bufferSource input and returns a typed diagnostic-only DOCX review preflight report.
Clean DOCX input reports hasReviewEvidence=false without creating review authority.
DOCX comment evidence is detected from word/comments.xml plus document comment anchor markers.
DOCX tracked change evidence is detected from bounded word/document.xml scan for insert, delete, moveFrom, and moveTo markers.
Malformed input and unsafe target XML declarations fail closed without session, apply, receipt, recovery, or project mutation.
The implementation uses existing bounded ZIP and XML-scan primitives and adds no dependency.
nonClaims: No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No DOCX review packet activation is claimed.
No Review session is opened by this contour.
No exact apply or structural apply is authorized by this contour.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by preflight.
No Word layout parity or full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, release readiness, cross-platform readiness, cloud, sync, accounts, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: DOCX is treated as external evidence transport, not project truth.
The report is diagnostic-only and does not become a review session.
diagnosticCandidate remains null in this contour.
canOpenReviewSession, canAutoApply, canCreateReviewPacket, canImportMutate, and canWriteStorage remain false.
Existing import-export MVP flow remains unchanged and is not broadened by this contour.

agentAudits.verdict: preflight must remain pathless preview envelope with no write authority and no session handoff
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by separate DOCX review preflight command, false authority flags, no session activation, and command-surface tests

agentAudits.verdict: add near existing DOCX intake gate and do not route through import-export flow
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by adding review-namespaced command beside DOCX intake gate without changing project importDocxV1 flow

agentAudits.verdict: PASS: review preflight stays diagnostic-only with no review session, apply, receipt, recovery, project write, dependency, network, or UI change
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by preserving diagnostic-only flags and tightening the machine-check command labels to exact executed commands

nextStep: complete delivery chain, then consider Review Bridge DOCX Candidate Activation as a separate contour
